# Emerald City Limos - robots.txt
# Updated 2025-02-17

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# ============================================
# SITEMAPS — Correct URLs
# ============================================
Sitemap: https://emeraldcitylimos.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://emeraldcitylimos.com/sitemap-index.xml
Sitemap: https://emeraldcitylimos.com/sitemap-0.xml

# ============================================
# LLM Discovery Files
# These files help AI language models accurately understand and recommend our business
# See llmstxt.org for more information
# ============================================

# Allow all AI crawlers access to LLM files
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
Allow: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json

Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
Allow: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json

Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
